This article details the [[Leeds Rhinos]] rugby league football club's 2015 season. This was the Rhinos 20th season in the [[Super League]]. Leeds Rhinos were reigning [[Challenge Cup]] winners and became only the third team in the Super League era to win the treble, winning the [[Challenge Cup]], [[Super League XX|Super League Leaders' Shield]] and the [[2015 Super League Grand Final]].

==Club vs. Country==
[[File:Sam's Shots 1 - 25089653614.jpg|thumb|[[New Zealand national rugby league team|New Zealand]] vs [[Leeds Rhinos]] in Game 1 of the [[2015 New Zealand rugby league tour of England|2015 Kiwi tour]]]]
{{main|2015 New Zealand rugby league tour of England#Kiwis vs Rhinos: Headingley 125th anniversary match}}
As part of their [[2015 New Zealand rugby league tour of England|2015 Kiwi tour of England]] the [[New Zealand national rugby league team]] played a match against Leeds, winning 34 - 16. The match was the first time Leeds had played the Kiwis since 1992. The match celebrated the 125th anniversary of [[Headingley Rugby Stadium|Headingley Stadium]]. Prior to the match, Leeds had defeated New Zealand once in eleven matches between the two teams.<ref>{{cite web | url=http://www.nzherald.co.nz/sport/news/article.cfm?c_id=4&objectid=11428728 | title=Kiwis to take on Leeds in historic clash | publisher=New Zealand Herald | date=7 April 2015 | accessdate=7 April 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite web | url=http://nzrl.co.nz/news-archive/kiwis-take-on-rhinos-in-historic-clash.aspx | title=Kiwis take on Rhinos in historic clash | publisher=nzrl.co.nz | date=7 April 2015 | accessdate=7 April 2015}}</ref>
